name: Toffee Bar Dessert Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and flour; cut in the butter.
2. Reserve 2/3 to 1 cup of the mixture.
3. Add the egg, buttermilk or milk, baking soda, salt, and vanilla extract to the remaining sugar mixture.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 pan.
5. Top with the reserved sugar mixture, chopped nuts (if using), and health bars.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
12 servings
